description_long: This is a compact, futuristic airplane with a streamlined fuselage and a single, large jet engine mounted at the rear. The wings are sharply swept back and feature pronounced anhedral angles, with small vertical winglets at the tips. The cockpit is forward-mounted and enclosed with a large, blue-tinted canopy, providing wide visibility for the pilot. The tail section is distinctive, with twin vertical stabilizers canted outward and a short horizontal stabilizer connecting them. The landing gear is tricycle-type, with a single nose wheel and two main wheels under the wings. The exterior is primarily a smooth, light gray metallic finish with subtle panel lines and minimal markings.
description: A compact, futuristic jet airplane with swept-back wings, twin outward-canted vertical stabilizers, and a forward, blue-tinted cockpit canopy. The body is smooth and metallic gray, with a single large rear jet engine and tricycle landing gear.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the large central jet engine, twin outward-canted vertical stabilizers, and the anhedral wing configuration.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the forward cockpit canopy, swept-back wings, and visible landing gear beneath the fuselage.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the blue-tinted cockpit canopy, pointed nose, and the full wingspan with downward-angled tips.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the cockpit, wing structure, and landing gear details.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, sharply swept with pronounced anhedral angles and small vertical winglets at the tips.
attribute_tail_design: Twin outward-canted vertical stabilizers with a short horizontal stabilizer, forming an H-tail configuration.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with one nose wheel and two main wheels under the wings.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a large blue-tinted canopy.
